hero.question: Will Bitcoin dip to $45,000 by December 31, 2026?
hero.prob_take: Bears just capitulated 10 points in 24 hours, signaling either a washout before a larger move down or serious conviction that $45K isn't getting tested before year-end. The 48% price is dead fair on a two-year macro timeline, but the directional momentum shift suggests smart money might be rotating bullish before the next institutional wave hits.

daily_take.headline: Bitcoin's $45K Floor Looks Too Rich. The Dip Trade Is Back On.
daily_take.deck: Bitcoin's downside bet just collapsed 10 points in 24 hours, plummeting from 58% to 48%. Smart money is clearly rotating out of doomsday scenarios. But 48% for a 28% drop in 2 years still prices in way too much pain. If you believe Bitcoin stabilizes above $50K through 2026, this is the contrarian short that actually prints.

sidebar.headline: CDU's 27-point collapse smells like late-stage polling fatigue, not a real shift. German elections aren't until September 2025. This thing finds higher ground.
sidebar.label: CDU Victory: 61.1%

sidebar.headline: Canucks bettors getting demolished. Check the injury reports before the puck drops, these odds are moving on news, not math.

sidebar.headline: Paramount deal at 77.5% is lazy pricing. Hollywood M&A timelines slip constantly. Size up the under before this thing hits 85%.
sidebar.label: Paramount-WB Deal: 77.5%
